caption: A man wearing a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, tan suspenders, and black headphones sits in a recording studio. He has a tall, light-gray stylized hairstyle. He is positioned in profile, facing left toward a black studio microphone. Behind him is a wall adorned with various framed photographs and posters, and a white equipment rack. A red and white logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is overlaid on the left and right sides of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains relatively still, though he slightly shifts his facial expression and head position, looking forward with a serious demeanor. The camera angle and lighting remain constant, and no other people are visible in the shot.
